Option: Bob, the leader of a robbery group, who ordered his subordinates to commit robbery on multiple occasions, but was never personally involved. Question: Bob is a male born on February 27, 1987. Bob stole from Alice a total of 5, 000 yuan in cash, one laptop (worth 13, 000 yuan), and other small jewelry on February 27, 2003. While Bob was climbing back over the wall, Bob was seen by Catherine. To escape, Bob quickly took a dag- ger from his pocket and stabbed in Catherine's heart, killing Catherine. So how should Bob's behavior be handled?
Options: × (A). The crime of robbery. × (B). The crime of theft. ✓ (C). The ground of intentional homicide. × (D). Bob does not constitute a crime.
Paragraphs: 1. A person who has reached the age of 14 and under 16 will not constitute the crime of robbery and theft. 2. Calculation of age. .. For example, you are 14 years old from the next day after your 14-th birthday.
